# Chardalis EPE

Chardalis EPE is a metal recycling and vehicle withdrawal business serving Thessaloniki, Greece.

Website: https://chardalisepe.gr/
Phone: +30 6944245218
Email: chardalisepe@hotmail.gr
Service area: Thessaloniki, Greece
Language: Greek

Main services:
- Metal recycling in Thessaloniki
- Copper recycling in Thessaloniki
- Iron and scrap metal recycling in Thessaloniki
- Aluminum recycling in Thessaloniki
- Scrap collection in Thessaloniki
- Vehicle withdrawal and final deregistration guidance in Thessaloniki

Important pages:
- https://chardalisepe.gr/anakyklosi-metallon-thessaloniki.html
- https://chardalisepe.gr/anakyklosi-xalkou-thessaloniki.html

The site does not publish prices. Visitors should contact the business for case-specific evaluation.
